ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly version of the product name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "image" TEXT /* File path to the product image */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* File path to the product thumbnail */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for inventory management */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor who provided the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product for shipping purposes */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions (LxWxH) of the product for shipping */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period for the product */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is featured */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Current stock status (e.g., In Stock, Out of Stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image for the category */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly version of the category name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the vendor */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the vendor registered */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Vendor's website URL */,
  "status" TEXT /* Vendor's status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address for shipping */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "final_price" TEXT /* Final price after discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user registered */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., Admin, Vendor, Customer) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the product */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the wishlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the wishlist */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product added to the wishlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the item was added to the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the payment (e.g., Completed, Failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently available */,
  "last_restocked" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last restocked */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level before restocking is required */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level to avoid overstocking */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date and time of the last stock check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("id")
)
